text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The trio consisting of Biwa Hayahide, Narita
Taishin, and Winning Ticket has been dubbed
"BNW" and is garnering attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, they compete in the Satsuki Sho, the first
race of the Classic Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each of them has their own strong motivation to
win, so this is bound to be an exciting race!
